scripts.build: bun run build:packages && bun run build:apps
scripts.build:packages: bun run --filter '@reactive-agents/core' build && bun run --filter '@reactive-agents/llm-provider' build && bun run --filter '@reactive-agents/memory' build && bun run --filter '@reactive-agents/eval' build && bun run --filter '@reactive-agents/tools' build && bun run --filter '@reactive-agents/prompts' build && bun run --filter '@reactive-agents/reasoning' build && bun run --filter '@reactive-agents/guardrails' build && bun run --filter '@reactive-agents/verification' build && bun run --filter '@reactive-agents/cost' build && bun run --filter '@reactive-agents/identity' build && bun run --filter '@reactive-agents/observability' build && bun run --filter '@reactive-agents/interaction' build && bun run --filter '@reactive-agents/orchestration' build && bun run --filter '@reactive-agents/a2a' build && bun run --filter '@reactive-agents/gateway' build && bun run --filter '@reactive-agents/health' build && bun run --filter '@reactive-agents/testing' build && bun run --filter '@reactive-agents/runtime' build && bun run --filter '@reactive-agents/benchmarks' build && bun run --filter 'reactive-agents' build
scripts.clean: find packages apps -name 'dist' -type d -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null || true && bun run build:clean
scripts.docs:dev: cd apps/docs && bun x astro dev
scripts.docs:build: cd apps/docs && bun x astro build
scripts.docs:preview: cd apps/docs && bun x astro preview
